description: Regression for the battlewagons deployment bug (2026-07-16): loading a save made during the Deployment phase turned every unit's status into a float (JSON has no int type), and the DEPLOY_UNIT validation's `status in [UNDEPLOYED, DEPLOYING]` check does not coerce int<->float, so every deployment after a load was rejected as 'Unit is not available for deployment' (the AI then banked its army into Strategic Reserves until the 50% cap and skipped the rest of its units, ending deployment with nothing on the board). The fixture is a real save captured at the start of deployment in the reported setup (P1 human Custodes Lions vs P2 Competitive-AI Battlewagons). Loads it through the real SaveLoadManager path, asserts statuses were normalized back to int, and proves a DEPLOY_UNIT for the active player succeeds after the load.
